summary: Dashboard Your day analysis turns clipboard captures into productivity insights and improvement suggestions.

introduced: Your day analyses today's clipboard captures every 30 minutes — category breakdown, behavioral insights, and suggestions to improve how you work
Dashboard settings let you show or hide quote, intelligent insight, Your day, metrics, bills, weather, resource usage, cloud sync, holidays, news, and the productivity chart
News feed ticker, next public holiday card, and collapsible intelligent insight and Your day sections on the Dashboard
changed: Productivity insights highlight dominant categories, source apps, context-switching patterns, and capture pace instead of generic summaries
Clipboard day analysis uses Apple Intelligence on macOS 26+ with a rule-based fallback everywhere else
Dashboard layout places resource usage and cloud sync above the public holiday row; news feed shows more rows with slower scroll
Marketing website updated with a Dashboard showcase and the latest app screenshot
fixed: Empty bullet points no longer appear in Your day productivity insights or improvement suggestions
Sensitive clipboard captures are excluded from analysis examples
removed: Work from your clipboard task cards removed from Your day — insights and suggestions remain
